---
title: "Examen práctico personal laboral AIREF"
author: "Ignacio Garijo Campos"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(modelsummary)

library(did)
library(fixest)

library(ranger)

library(rdrobust)
library(rddensity)

theme_set(theme_minimal()+ 
            theme(axis.line = element_line(color="black"), 
                  axis.ticks = element_line(color="black"), 
                  panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color="lightgrey")))

setwd("C:/Users/ignac/OneDrive/Documentos/GitHub/apuntes/examenes_tipo/")

```


```{r}
mtcars %>% 
  ggplot(aes(wt,mpg))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(data = filter(mtcars, wt < 3), method = "lm", formula = y ~ poly(x, 2), se = FALSE) +
  geom_smooth(data = filter(mtcars, wt > 3), method = "lm", formula = y ~ poly(x, 2), se = FALSE)

```
